title: Cross totem of god
description: Cross totem of god who save your life
body: Transform your Minecraft experience with the Cross totem of god Resource Pack! Say farewell to traditional totems and embrace a new symbol of resilience and protection: the Cross. With intricate designs and meaningful symbolism, this pack replaces the standard totems in your game with beautifully crafted crosses, adding a touch of spiritual significance to your adventures. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or battling formidable foes, let the Cross totem of god Resource Pack be your steadfast companion in the world of Minecraft.![Cross](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4133e00f9d99e927fb76e83f6ff790cf741386dc.png)
